scripts.frontend:run: cd frontend && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.deploy: sam build && (sam deploy --no-confirm-changeset || echo 'No infrastructure changes detected, continuing...') && npm run frontend:build && aws s3 sync frontend/dist/ s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name cooking-web-stack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`FrontendBucketName`].OutputValue' --output text) --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name cooking-web-stack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`FrontendCloudFrontId`].OutputValue' --output text) --paths '/*'
